Teal's official site embeds and attributes current short-form career content to @teal_hq.

evidence_boundaries: These rows are review candidates, not authoritative registry mutations or proof of account ownership.
Official-site links and verified product-publisher links receive high confidence; search-result resemblance alone is not accepted.
No verified source found means this bounded review was inconclusive, not that the competitor has no account.
No provider call, login, follow, message, account change, or publication was performed.
Only public short-form social sources are in scope; official websites, blogs, newsletters, podcasts, LinkedIn, and other source classes remain separate coverage domains.
